data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Targets (like buttons) are sized appropriately and positioned to enhance usability.
data.technical_spec: Ensures interactable elements are easily accessible with consideration of distance and size.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Limits choices to reduce decision time and improve user experience.
data.technical_spec: Focused and intuitive navigation menus with progressive disclosure.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Design aligns with user expectations based on their experience with other platforms.
data.technical_spec: Familiar interface patterns and consistent design language.

data.title: Serial Position Effect
data.description: Key information is placed at the start or end of the view to maximize recall.
data.technical_spec: Strategic placement of primary content in top and bottom sections.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Visually appealing design is perceived as easier to use, enhancing user satisfaction.
data.technical_spec: Use of modern design trends, visual hierarchy, and consistent branding.
